reviews.comment:
Por medio del presente, quiero destacar y agradecer, la excelente atención recibida en ésta sucursal del ACA. Muy atentos todo el personal, tanto en playa como en full.

(Translated by Google)
I would like to take this opportunity to express my gratitude for the excellent service I received at this ACA branch. All the staff were very attentive, both on the forecourt and in the full service area.

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, nos trataron mal!! solo por ser de otro país no nos quisieron cargar combustible, racistas!! 😠 La axion nos atendió super bien y sin problema nos cargó

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, they treated us badly!! Just because we're from another country they refused to fill our tank, racists!! 😠 The Axion station served us very well and filled our tank without any problem
